rulings.Case Title: JESSE BEVERLY JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendants Curtiss-Wright Corporation, Lockheed Martin Tactical Systems, Inc., The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company, and Aircraft Braking Systems Corporation¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel for defendants inform Mr. Beverly of the tentative ruling and he states that he does not wish to contest. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS RUBINO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Leave To File 1st Amended Complt
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted based on the parties¿ representation that they have stipulated that plaintiffs will correct the pleading and file the first amended complaint naming the correct entity, Cyprus Amax Mineral Company. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY ESPITALLIER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Defendant Volkswagen Group Of America, Inc.'S Memorandum Of Costs
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiff¿s motion to tax defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.¿s memorandum of costs is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Berry & Berry costs and denied as to deposition costs and service of process costs. The deposition and service of process costs were reasonably necessary. The Berry & Berry costs are non-recoverable attorney and paralegal costs. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID J. PALOMARES VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC¿s motion for summary judgment is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID J. PALOMARES VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Alfa Laval, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Recover Unreimbursed Costs And Fees Against The Clients Of Bryan Cave Llp
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Berry & Berry¿s motion to recover unreimbursed costs and fees against the clients of Bryan Cave LLP is granted only against Bryan Cave LLP¿s clients and not as to the law firm. No opposition filed. No showing has been made that the law firm is liable for the costs and fees. = (220/HEK)
